title: hippuris montana
intro: Hippuris montana, also known as marsh lemongrass or alder lemongrass, is a plant species native to wetlands in Europe and Asia. Hippuris montana has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects, as well as its ability to act as an antiseptic and antimicrobial agent. The health benefits of Hippuris montana include its potential to help with urinary tract issues, kidney stones, and inflammation, as well as its use in treating skin conditions and wounds. Hippuris montana can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and has also been used in traditional herbal remedies in the form of salves and creams for skin applications.
